message:
test(cli,core,crypto,host,mesh,store,sandbox,sdk,registry,streaming,testkit): comprehensive unit test additions across 36 modules

Add extensive unit test coverage across the entire flywheel_connectors
workspace. All changes are purely additive — new #[cfg(test)] mod tests
blocks or new test functions appended to existing test modules. No
production logic is modified.

Test categories and coverage:

fcp-cli (14 modules):
- audit: format_timestamp, truncate, load_events edge cases
- bench: benchmark config, runner edge cases
- budget: budget command adjustments
- connector: CLI parsing tests
- context/types: context type coverage
- doctor: command and type serde/Display tests
- net: network CLI tests
- new: scaffold generator (normalize_crate_slug, etc.)
- package/types: serde roundtrips, validation
- policy: simulation parsing, created_at, evaluator
- repair: command and type tests

fcp-crypto (1 module):
- cose: CWT claims builder coverage, CoseToken error paths, timing
  validation edge cases, CapabilityTokenBuilder, claim key constants

fcp-host (3 modules):
- budget: BudgetAction, BudgetTracker, BudgetPolicyEngine async tests
- doctor: OverallStatus, FreshnessLevel, DoctorReport serde
- error: all HostError variant Display tests

fcp-mesh (4 modules):
- planner: version_gte edge cases, LeasePurpose Display
- replay: looks_like_json, event_type_label, trace parsing
- transport: TransportPathKind priority/mode, TransportPath construction

fcp-store (6 modules):
- error: all ObjectStoreError, SymbolStoreError, RepairError, GcError Display
- gc: config, policy, stats, decision tests
- object_store: memory store edge cases
- offline/quarantine: store operation tests
- symbol_store: operations, metadata, policy

fcp-sandbox (2 modules):
- egress: canonicalize_host_pattern, check_ip_constraints with deny flags
- wasi: WasiConfig builder chaining, network constraints, timeouts

fcp-sdk (2 modules):
- formatting: FormatMode, validate_html/markdown, escape functions
- ratelimit: config, token bucket, burst tests

fcp-registry, fcp-streaming, fcp-testkit (4 modules):
- registry: signature_message determinism, hash_bytes, verification
- streaming: reconnect delay calculations, stream tests
- testkit: assert_json_array_len, assert_ok/err, assert_error_type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
